option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Health App
Android app for entering, storing, and syncing health measurements.
## What this project includes
- Jetpack Compose + Material 3 UI - MVVM architecture with Repository layer - Room local database (local-first behavior) - Firebase Authentication (email/password) - Cloud Firestore sync per user (`userId`) - Input validation, edit/delete/list/details flows - Sensor or mock API autofill support for selected fields - Localization with Slovenian and English strings
## Tech stack
- Kotlin - Jetpack Compose - Room + KSP - Navigation Compose - ViewModel + StateFlow - Kotlin Coroutines + Flow - Firebase Auth + Firestore - Retrofit + Gson
## SDK targets
- `minSdk = 28` - `targetSdk = 36` - `compileSdk = 36`
## Firebase and Gradle setup
This project uses a Version Catalog (`gradle/libs.versions.toml`) and plugin aliases.
### 1) Place Firebase config file
- Copy `google-services.json` to `app/google-services.json`.
### 2) Use required versions
In `gradle/libs.versions.toml`:
- `googleServices = "4.4.4"` - `firebaseBom = "34.11.0"`
### 3) Root Gradle plugin registration
In `build.gradle.kts`:
```kotlin plugins { // ... alias(libs.plugins.google.services) apply false } ```
### 4) App module plugin and Firebase SDKs
In `app/build.gradle.kts`:
```kotlin plugins { id("com.android.application") // or alias(libs.plugins.android.application)
id("com.google.gms.google-services") // or alias(libs.plugins.google.services) }
dependencies { implementation(platform("com.google.firebase:firebase-bom:34.11.0"))
// add Firebase products you use implementation("com.google.firebase:firebase-auth") implementation("com.google.firebase:firebase-firestore") } ```
Equivalent alias-based setup already used in this project:
- `implementation(platform(libs.firebase.bom))` - `implementation(libs.firebase.auth)` - `implementation(libs.firebase.firestore)`
### 5) Sync project
```powershell .\gradlew.bat --refresh-dependencies ```
## Firebase Console checklist
1. Create a Firebase project. 2. Add Android app with package `com.example.health_app`. 3. Enable `Authentication > Sign-in method > Email/Password`. 4. Create Firestore database (test mode for development).
## Firestore security rules (recommended)
```javascript rules_version = '2'; service cloud.firestore { match /databases/{database}/documents { match /meritve/{meritevId} { allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId; allow create: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.userId; } } } ```
## Run
```powershell .\gradlew.bat :app:assembleDebug ```
Then run from Android Studio on an emulator/device (API 28+).
## Quick verification checklist
- Register user with valid email and password (6+ chars) - Login and open measurement input screen - Save measurement and confirm list/details update - Trigger cloud sync and verify Firestore documents - Logout and confirm app returns to auth screen - Switch language and verify translated strings

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Health App
Android app for entering, storing, and syncing health measurements.
## What this project includes
- Jetpack Compose + Material 3 UI - MVVM architecture with Repository layer - Room local database (local-first behavior) - Firebase Authentication (email/password) - Cloud Firestore sync per user (`userId`) - Input validation, edit/delete/list/details flows - Sensor or mock API autofill support for selected fields - Localization with Slovenian and English strings - TensorFlow Lite health status classification (Normal/Elevated/Critical) - Gemini AI summary card on the statistics screen
## Tech stack
- Kotlin - Jetpack Compose - Room + KSP - Navigation Compose - ViewModel + StateFlow - Kotlin Coroutines + Flow - Firebase Auth + Firestore - Retrofit + Gson - TensorFlow Lite - Gemini API (Google AI SDK)
## SDK targets
- `minSdk = 28` - `targetSdk = 36` - `compileSdk = 36`
## Firebase and Gradle setup
This project uses a Version Catalog (`gradle/libs.versions.toml`) and plugin aliases.
### 1) Place Firebase config file
- Copy `google-services.json` to `app/google-services.json`.
### 2) Use required versions
In `gradle/libs.versions.toml`:
- `googleServices = "4.4.4"` - `firebaseBom = "34.11.0"`
### 3) Root Gradle plugin registration
In `build.gradle.kts`:
```kotlin plugins { // ... alias(libs.plugins.google.services) apply false } ```
### 4) App module plugin and Firebase SDKs
In `app/build.gradle.kts`:
```kotlin plugins { id("com.android.application") // or alias(libs.plugins.android.application)
id("com.google.gms.google-services") // or alias(libs.plugins.google.services) }
dependencies { implementation(platform("com.google.firebase:firebase-bom:34.11.0"))
// add Firebase products you use implementation("com.google.firebase:firebase-auth") implementation("com.google.firebase:firebase-firestore") } ```
Equivalent alias-based setup already used in this project:
- `implementation(platform(libs.firebase.bom))` - `implementation(libs.firebase.auth)` - `implementation(libs.firebase.firestore)`
### 5) Sync project
```powershell .\gradlew.bat --refresh-dependencies ```
## Gemini API setup
Add your API key to `local.properties` (project root):
```properties GEMINI_API_KEY=YOUR_API_KEY_HERE ```
The key is injected into `BuildConfig.GEMINI_API_KEY` via `app/build.gradle.kts`.
## TensorFlow Lite setup
Place your model file here:
- `app/src/main/assets/health_classifier.tflite`
Current implementation automatically falls back to a rule-based classifier when the model file is missing or cannot be loaded.
You can generate the model with the included scripts:
```powershell Set-Location "D:\1\TZVA\android-health-app" py -m pip install -r .\ml\requirements.txt py .\ml\train_health_classifier.py py .\ml\test_tflite_model.py ```
If local training fails because of low disk/RAM, use Google Colab and copy the exported `health_classifier.tflite` into `app/src/main/assets/`.
## Firebase Console checklist
1. Create a Firebase project. 2. Add Android app with package `com.example.health_app`. 3. Enable `Authentication > Sign-in method > Email/Password`. 4. Create Firestore database (test mode for development).
## Firestore security rules (recommended)
```javascript rules_version = '2'; service cloud.firestore { match /databases/{database}/documents { match /meritve/{meritevId} { allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId; allow create: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.userId; } } } ```
## Run
```powershell .\gradlew.bat :app:assembleDebug ```
Then run from Android Studio on an emulator/device (API 28+).
## Quick verification checklist
- Register user with valid email and password (6+ chars) - Login and open measurement input screen - Save measurement and confirm list/details update - Trigger cloud sync and verify Firestore documents - Logout and confirm app returns to auth screen - Switch language and verify translated strings - Open details screen and verify health status classification + confidence - Open statistics screen and generate Gemini AI summary

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Healthapp">
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Healthapp"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.BODY_SENSORS" /> <uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.sensor.heartrate" android:required="false" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:usesCleartextTraffic="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Healthapp">
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Healthapp"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Place TensorFlow Lite model file here: - health_classifier.tflite
The app will use this model for on-device health classification. If missing, it falls back to a rule-based classifier.

option.value:
<string name="datum_meritve">Measurement Date</string> <string name="srcni_utrip">Heart Rate (bpm)</string> <string name="spo2">SpO2 (%)</string> <string name="temperatura">Temperature (°C)</string>
<!-- Detail labels --> <string name="zdravstveni_podatki">Health Data</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_label">Heart Rate</string> <string name="spo2_label">SpO2</string> <string name="temperatura_label">Temperature</string> <string name="zdravstveno_stanje">Health Status</string> <string name="normalno">Normal</string> <string name="povisano">Elevated</string> <string name="kriticno">Critical</string> <string name="nenormalno">Abnormal</string>
<!-- Units --> <string name="bpm_value">%d bpm</string> <string name="spo2_value">SpO2: %d%%</string> <string name="spo2_detail_value">%d %%</string> <string name="temp_value">%s °C</string>
<!-- Buttons --> <string name="shrani_meritev">Save Measurement</string> <string name="izbrisi">Delete</string> <string name="preklici">Cancel</string> <string name="potrdi">Confirm</string> <string name="uredi">Edit</string> <string name="sinhroniziraj">Sync</string> <string name="odjava">Logout</string> <string name="prijava">Login</string> <string name="registracija">Register</string> <string name="email">Email</string> <string name="geslo">Password</string> <string name="pokazi_geslo">Show</string> <string name="skrij_geslo">Hide</string> <string name="prijava_z_google">Sign in with Google</string> <string name="google_sign_in_failed">Google sign-in failed</string> <string name="google_sign_in_no_token">Google sign-in did not return an ID token</string> <string name="google_sign_in_cancelled">Google sign-in was cancelled</string> <string name="google_sign_in_config_error">Google sign-in is misconfigured (check SHA-1/SHA-256 in Firebase)</string> <string name="nimas_racuna">No account? Register</string> <string name="imas_racun">Already have an account? Login</string>
<string name="neveljaven_vnos">Invalid input</string> <string name="neveljaven_email">Invalid email format</string> <string name="geslo_prekratko">Password must be at least 6 characters</string>
<!-- Snackbar --> <string name="meritev_shranjena">Measurement saved successfully!</string> <string name="meritev_posodobljena">Measurement updated successfully!</string> <string name="meritev_izbrisana">Measurement deleted</string> <string name="napaka_shranjevanja">Error saving measurement</string> <string name="sinhronizirano">Synced: %1$d measurements</string> <string name="shranjeno_lokalno_oblak_nedosegljiv">Saved locally (cloud unavailable)</string>
<!-- Delete dialog --> <string name="potrdi_brisanje">Confirm Deletion</string> <string name="potrdi_brisanje_sporocilo">Are you sure you want to delete this measurement?</string>
<!-- Search --> <string name="iskanje">Search by name…</string> <string name="prijavljen_kot">Signed in: %1$s</string> <string name="preberi_srcni_utrip">Read heart rate (sensor/API)</string> <string name="preberi_spo2">Read SpO2 (API)</string> <string name="preberi_temperaturo">Read temperature (API)</string>
<!-- Empty state --> <string name="meritev_ni_najdena">Measurement not found</string>
<!-- Statistics --> <string name="statistika">Statistics</string> <string name="povprecje">Average</string> <string name="minimum">Minimum</string> <string name="maximum">Maximum</string> <string name="skupno_meritev">Total Measurements</string> <string name="trend_meritev">Heart Rate Trend</string> <string name="ai_asistent">AI Assistant</string> <string name="generiraj_ai_povzetek">Generate AI Summary</string> <string name="ai_povzetek_namig">Tap the button to generate a summary of recent measurements.</string> <string name="ai_povzetek_napaka">Failed to generate AI summary</string> <string name="confidence_line">Confidence - Normal: %1$d%%, Elevated: %2$d%%, Critical: %3$d%%</string> <string name="tflite_model_used">Classification: TensorFlow Lite model</string> <string name="rule_based_fallback">Classification: rule-based fallback (model unavailable)</string> <string name="ni_meritev">No saved measurements</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Health App</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nova_meritev">New Measurement</string> <string name="seznam_meritev">Measurement List</string> <string name="podrobnosti_meritve">Measurement Details</string> <string name="uredi_meritev">Edit Measurement</string>
<!-- Form labels --> <string name="ime">First Name</string> <string name="priimek">Last Name</string> <string name="datum_meritve">Measurement Date</string> <string name="srcni_utrip">Heart Rate (bpm)</string> <string name="spo2">SpO2 (%)</string> <string name="temperatura">Temperature (°C)</string>
<!-- Detail labels --> <string name="zdravstveni_podatki">Health Data</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_label">Heart Rate</string> <string name="spo2_label">SpO2</string> <string name="temperatura_label">Temperature</string> <string name="zdravstveno_stanje">Health Status</string> <string name="normalno">Normal</string> <string name="povisano">Elevated</string> <string name="kriticno">Critical</string> <string name="nenormalno">Abnormal</string>
<!-- Units --> <string name="bpm_value">%d bpm</string> <string name="spo2_value">SpO2: %d%%</string> <string name="spo2_detail_value">%d %%</string> <string name="temp_value">%s °C</string>
<!-- Buttons --> <string name="shrani_meritev">Save Measurement</string> <string name="btn_seznam_meritev">Measurement List</string> <string name="izbrisi">Delete</string> <string name="preklici">Cancel</string> <string name="potrdi">Confirm</string> <string name="uredi">Edit</string> <string name="sinhroniziraj">Sync</string> <string name="odjava">Logout</string> <string name="prijava">Login</string> <string name="registracija">Register</string> <string name="email">Email</string> <string name="geslo">Password</string> <string name="pokazi_geslo">Show</string> <string name="skrij_geslo">Hide</string> <string name="prijava_z_google">Sign in with Google</string> <string name="google_sign_in_failed">Google sign-in failed</string> <string name="google_sign_in_no_token">Google sign-in did not return an ID token</string> <string name="google_sign_in_cancelled">Google sign-in was cancelled</string> <string name="google_sign_in_config_error">Google sign-in is misconfigured (check SHA-1/SHA-256 in Firebase)</string> <string name="nimas_racuna">No account? Register</string> <string name="imas_racun">Already have an account? Login</string>
<!-- Validation --> <string name="polje_obvezno">Field is required</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_napaka">Value must be between 30 and 250 bpm</string> <string name="spo2_napaka">Value must be between 0 and 100 %%</string> <string name="temperatura_napaka">Value must be between 34.0 and 42.0 °C</string> <string name="neveljaven_vnos">Invalid input</string> <string name="neveljaven_email">Invalid email format</string> <string name="geslo_prekratko">Password must be at least 6 characters</string>
<!-- Snackbar --> <string name="meritev_shranjena">Measurement saved successfully!</string> <string name="meritev_posodobljena">Measurement updated successfully!</string> <string name="meritev_izbrisana">Measurement deleted</string> <string name="napaka_shranjevanja">Error saving measurement</string> <string name="sinhronizirano">Synced: %1$d measurements</string> <string name="shranjeno_lokalno_oblak_nedosegljiv">Saved locally (cloud unavailable)</string>
<!-- Delete dialog --> <string name="potrdi_brisanje">Confirm Deletion</string> <string name="potrdi_brisanje_sporocilo">Are you sure you want to delete this measurement?</string>
<!-- Search --> <string name="iskanje">Search by name…</string> <string name="prijavljen_kot">Signed in: %1$s</string> <string name="preberi_srcni_utrip">Read heart rate (sensor/API)</string> <string name="preberi_spo2">Read SpO2 (API)</string> <string name="preberi_temperaturo">Read temperature (API)</string>
<!-- Empty state --> <string name="meritev_ni_najdena">Measurement not found</string>
<!-- Statistics --> <string name="statistika">Statistics</string> <string name="povprecje">Average</string> <string name="minimum">Minimum</string> <string name="maximum">Maximum</string> <string name="skupno_meritev">Total Measurements</string> <string name="trend_meritev">Heart Rate Trend</string> <string name="ai_asistent">AI Assistant</string> <string name="generiraj_ai_povzetek">Generate AI Summary</string> <string name="ai_povzetek_namig">Tap the button to generate a summary of recent measurements.</string> <string name="ai_povzetek_napaka">Failed to generate AI summary</string> <string name="ai_local_fallback">Local summary: the last %1$d measurements show an average heart rate of %2$s bpm, SpO₂ of %3$s%%, and temperature of %4$s °C.</string> <string name="confidence_line">Confidence - Normal: %1$d%%, Elevated: %2$d%%, Critical: %3$d%%</string> <string name="tflite_model_used">Classification: TensorFlow Lite model</string> <string name="rule_based_fallback">Classification: rule-based fallback (model unavailable)</string> <string name="ni_meritev">No saved measurements</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Zdravstvena aplikacija</string> <string name="default_web_client_id">973479661711-udnapimsp3epcsq1s7dteglt020rtjto.apps.googleusercontent.com</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nova_meritev">Nova meritev</string> <string name="seznam_meritev">Seznam meritev</string> <string name="podrobnosti_meritve">Podrobnosti meritve</string> <string name="uredi_meritev">Uredi meritev</string>
<!-- Form labels --> <string name="ime">Ime</string> <string name="priimek">Priimek</string> <string name="datum_meritve">Datum meritve</string> <string name="srcni_utrip">Srčni utrip (bpm)</string> <string name="spo2">SpO2 (%)</string> <string name="temperatura">Temperatura (°C)</string>
<!-- Detail labels --> <string name="zdravstveni_podatki">Zdravstveni podatki</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_label">Srčni utrip</string> <string name="spo2_label">SpO2</string> <string name="temperatura_label">Temperatura</string> <string name="zdravstveno_stanje">Zdravstveno stanje</string> <string name="normalno">Normalno</string> <string name="nenormalno">Nenormalno</string>
<!-- Units --> <string name="bpm_value">%d bpm</string> <string name="spo2_value">SpO2: %d%%</string> <string name="spo2_detail_value">%d %%</string> <string name="temp_value">%s °C</string>
<!-- Buttons --> <string name="shrani_meritev">Shrani meritev</string> <string name="btn_seznam_meritev">Seznam meritev</string> <string name="izbrisi">Izbriši</string> <string name="skrij_geslo">Skrij</string> <string name="prijava_z_google">Prijava z Google</string> <string name="nimas_racuna">Nimaš računa? Registriraj se</string> <string name="imas_racun">Imaš račun? Prijavi se</string>
<!-- Validation --> <string name="polje_obvezno">Polje je obvezno</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 30 in 250 bpm</string> <string name="spo2_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 0 in 100 %%</string> <string name="temperatura_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 34,0 in 42,0 °C</string> <string name="neveljaven_vnos">Neveljaven vnos</string> <string name="neveljaven_email">Neveljavna oblika e-pošte</string> <string name="geslo_prekratko">Geslo mora imeti vsaj 6 znakov</string>
<!-- Snackbar --> <string name="meritev_shranjena">Meritev uspešno shranjena!</string> <string name="napaka_shranjevanja">Napaka pri shranjevanju meritve</string> <string name="sinhronizirano">Sinhronizirano: %1$d meritev</string> <string name="shranjeno_lokalno_oblak_nedosegljiv">Shranjeno lokalno (oblak ni dosegljiv)</string>
<!-- Delete dialog --> <string name="potrdi_brisanje">Potrdi brisanje</string> <string name="potrdi_brisanje_sporocilo">Ali ste prepričani, da želite izbrisati to meritev?</string>
<!-- Search --> <string name="preberi_srcni_utrip">Preberi srčni utrip (senzor/API)</string> <string name="preberi_spo2">Preberi SpO2 (API)</string> <string name="preberi_temperaturo">Preberi temperaturo (API)</string>
<!-- Empty state --> <string name="ni_meritev">Ni shranjenih meritev</string> <string name="meritev_ni_najdena">Meritev ni najdena</string>
<!-- Statistics --> <string name="statistika">Statistika meritev</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Zdravstvena aplikacija</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nova_meritev">Nova meritev</string> <string name="seznam_meritev">Seznam meritev</string> <string name="podrobnosti_meritve">Podrobnosti meritve</string> <string name="uredi_meritev">Uredi meritev</string>
<!-- Form labels --> <string name="ime">Ime</string> <string name="priimek">Priimek</string> <string name="datum_meritve">Datum meritve</string> <string name="srcni_utrip">Srčni utrip (bpm)</string> <string name="spo2">SpO2 (%)</string> <string name="temperatura">Temperatura (°C)</string>
<!-- Detail labels --> <string name="zdravstveni_podatki">Zdravstveni podatki</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_label">Srčni utrip</string> <string name="spo2_label">SpO2</string> <string name="temperatura_label">Temperatura</string> <string name="zdravstveno_stanje">Zdravstveno stanje</string> <string name="normalno">Normalno</string> <string name="povisano">Povišano</string> <string name="kriticno">Kritično</string> <string name="nenormalno">Nenormalno</string>
<!-- Units --> <string name="bpm_value">%d bpm</string> <string name="spo2_value">SpO2: %d%%</string> <string name="spo2_detail_value">%d %%</string> <string name="temp_value">%s °C</string>
<!-- Buttons --> <string name="shrani_meritev">Shrani meritev</string> <string name="btn_seznam_meritev">Seznam meritev</string> <string name="izbrisi">Izbriši</string> <string name="preklici">Prekliči</string> <string name="potrdi">Potrdi</string> <string name="uredi">Uredi</string> <string name="sinhroniziraj">Sinhroniziraj</string> <string name="odjava">Odjava</string> <string name="prijava">Prijava</string> <string name="registracija">Registracija</string> <string name="email">E-pošta</string> <string name="geslo">Geslo</string> <string name="pokazi_geslo">Pokaži</string> <string name="skrij_geslo">Skrij</string> <string name="prijava_z_google">Prijava z Google</string> <string name="google_sign_in_failed">Google prijava ni uspela</string> <string name="google_sign_in_no_token">Google prijava ni vrnila ID žetona</string> <string name="google_sign_in_cancelled">Google prijava je bila preklicana</string> <string name="google_sign_in_config_error">Google prijava ni pravilno nastavljena (preveri SHA-1/SHA-256 v Firebase)</string> <string name="nimas_racuna">Nimaš računa? Registriraj se</string> <string name="imas_racun">Imaš račun? Prijavi se</string>
<!-- Validation --> <string name="polje_obvezno">Polje je obvezno</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 30 in 250 bpm</string> <string name="spo2_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 0 in 100 %%</string> <string name="temperatura_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 34,0 in 42,0 °C</string> <string name="neveljaven_vnos">Neveljaven vnos</string> <string name="neveljaven_email">Neveljavna oblika e-pošte</string> <string name="geslo_prekratko">Geslo mora imeti vsaj 6 znakov</string>
<!-- Snackbar --> <string name="meritev_shranjena">Meritev uspešno shranjena!</string> <string name="meritev_posodobljena">Meritev uspešno posodobljena!</string> <string name="meritev_izbrisana">Meritev izbrisana</string> <string name="napaka_shranjevanja">Napaka pri shranjevanju meritve</string> <string name="sinhronizirano">Sinhronizirano: %1$d meritev</string> <string name="shranjeno_lokalno_oblak_nedosegljiv">Shranjeno lokalno (oblak ni dosegljiv)</string>
<!-- Delete dialog --> <string name="potrdi_brisanje">Potrdi brisanje</string> <string name="potrdi_brisanje_sporocilo">Ali ste prepričani, da želite izbrisati to meritev?</string>
<!-- Search --> <string name="iskanje">Iskanje po imenu…</string> <string name="prijavljen_kot">Prijavljen: %1$s</string> <string name="preberi_srcni_utrip">Preberi srčni utrip (senzor/API)</string> <string name="preberi_spo2">Preberi SpO2 (API)</string> <string name="preberi_temperaturo">Preberi temperaturo (API)</string>
<!-- Empty state --> <string name="ni_meritev">Ni shranjenih meritev</string> <string name="meritev_ni_najdena">Meritev ni najdena</string>
<!-- Statistics --> <string name="statistika">Statistika meritev</string> <string name="povprecje">Povprečje</string> <string name="minimum">Minimum</string> <string name="maximum">Maksimum</string> <string name="skupno_meritev">Skupno meritev</string> <string name="trend_meritev">Trend srčnega utripa</string> <string name="ai_asistent">AI asistent</string> <string name="generiraj_ai_povzetek">Generiraj AI povzetek</string> <string name="ai_povzetek_namig">Klikni gumb za generiranje povzetka zadnjih meritev.</string> <string name="ai_povzetek_napaka">Generiranje AI povzetka ni uspelo</string> <string name="ai_local_fallback">Lokalni povzetek: zadnjih %1$d meritev kaže povprečni srčni utrip %2$s bpm, SpO₂ %3$s %% in temperaturo %4$s °C.</string> <string name="confidence_line">Zaupanje - Normalno: %1$d%%, Povišano: %2$d%%, Kritično: %3$d%%</string> <string name="tflite_model_used">Klasifikacija: TensorFlow Lite model</string> <string name="rule_based_fallback">Klasifikacija: fallback pravila (model ni na voljo)</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# TFLite Health Classifier (Option 2)
This folder contains scripts to train and export a real TensorFlow Lite model for health classification from three inputs:
- heart rate (`srcniUtrip`) - SpO2 (`spO2`) - body temperature (`temperatura`)
## Files
- `train_health_classifier.py` - trains Keras model and exports `.tflite` - `test_tflite_model.py` - runs quick inference sanity check - `requirements.txt` - Python dependencies
## Output
The training script writes files into Android assets:
- `app/src/main/assets/health_classifier.tflite` - `app/src/main/assets/health_classifier.meta.json`
Class index order is fixed to match the Android app:
- `0 = NORMAL` - `1 = ELEVATED` - `2 = CRITICAL`
## Run locally (Windows)
```powershell Set-Location "D:\1\TZVA\android-health-app" py -m pip install -r .\ml\requirements.txt py .\ml\train_health_classifier.py py .\ml\test_tflite_model.py ```
## If your machine has low disk space
Use Google Colab:
1. Upload `train_health_classifier.py`. 2. Run training and export. 3. Download `health_classifier.tflite`. 4. Copy it to `app/src/main/assets/health_classifier.tflite`.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import json from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np import tensorflow as tf
RNG = np.random.default_rng(42) CLASS_NAMES = ["NORMAL", "ELEVATED", "CRITICAL"]
def classify_rule_based(hr: float, spo2: float, temp: float) -> int: # Keep class mapping aligned with Android app: # 0 NORMAL, 1 ELEVATED, 2 CRITICAL if hr > 120 or spo2 < 90 or temp > 39.0: return 2 if hr > 100 or spo2 < 95 or temp > 37.5: return 1 return 0
def generate_dataset(size: int = 8000): hr = RNG.uniform(40, 160, size) spo2 = RNG.uniform(82, 100, size) temp = RNG.uniform(34.0, 41.0, size)
# Add a little noise for robustness. hr += RNG.normal(0, 2.5, size) spo2 += RNG.normal(0, 0.6, size) temp += RNG.normal(0, 0.15, size)
x = np.stack([hr, spo2, temp], axis=1).astype(np.float32) y = np.array([classify_rule_based(h, s, t) for h, s, t in x], dtype=np.int32) return x, y
def build_model() -> tf.keras.Model: model = tf.keras.Sequential( [ tf.keras.layers.Input(shape=(3,), dtype=tf.float32), tf.keras.layers.Dense(16, activation="relu"), tf.keras.layers.Dense(8, activation="relu"), tf.keras.layers.Dense(3, activation="softmax"), ] ) model.compile( optimizer=tf.keras.optimizers.Adam(learning_rate=0.001), loss=tf.keras.losses.SparseCategoricalCrossentropy(), metrics=["accuracy"], ) return model
def main(): root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] assets_dir = root / "app" / "src" / "main" / "assets" assets_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
x, y = generate_dataset()
# Split train/validation. split = int(0.8 * len(x)) x_train, x_val = x[:split], x[split:] y_train, y_val = y[:split], y[split:]
model = build_model() model.fit( x_train, y_train, validation_data=(x_val, y_val), epochs=35, batch_size=64, verbose=2, )
val_loss, val_acc = model.evaluate(x_val, y_val, verbose=0) print(f"Validation accuracy: {val_acc:.4f}, loss: {val_loss:.4f}")
converter = tf.lite.TFLiteConverter.from_keras_model(model) converter.optimizations = [] tflite_model = converter.convert()
model_path = assets_dir / "health_classifier.tflite" model_path.write_bytes(tflite_model) print(f"Saved TFLite model to: {model_path}")
metadata = { "class_order": CLASS_NAMES, "input": ["srcniUtrip", "spO2", "temperatura"], "input_shape": [1, 3], "dtype": "float32", "notes": "Trained on synthetic data labeled by task rules.", } (assets_dir / "health_classifier.meta.json").write_text( json.dumps(metadata, indent=2), encoding="utf-8" ) print(f"Saved metadata to: {assets_dir / 'health_classifier.meta.json'}")
if __name__ == "__main__": main()
